summary: Completed testing of dynamic city selector feature for user and business registration forms. All backend API tests (32/32) and frontend UI tests passed. Cities load dynamically based on selected country, support free-text input for custom cities, and the seed endpoint is idempotent.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/cities?country_code=MX returns 20 Mexican cities - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/cities?country_code=CO returns 10 Colombian cities - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/cities?country_code=ES returns 8 Spanish cities - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/cities?country_code=US returns 10 US cities - PASSED
Backend: Country code is case insensitive - PASSED
Backend: Cities have required fields (name, slug, country_code, state) - PASSED
Backend: Default country is MX when no country_code provided - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/auth/register accepts city field - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/auth/register accepts custom city not in list - PASSED
Backend: Seed endpoint is idempotent (no duplicates) - PASSED
Backend: All 22 countries have expected city counts - PASSED
Frontend USER REGISTRATION: City selector appears after phone field - PASSED
Frontend USER REGISTRATION: Opening city selector shows 20 cities for MX - PASSED
Frontend USER REGISTRATION: Changing country from MX to CO loads Colombian cities (Bogotá, Medellín, etc) - PASSED
Frontend USER REGISTRATION: Can type custom city name not in list - PASSED
Frontend USER REGISTRATION: 'No se encontró. Puedes escribir tu ciudad' message shown for custom city - PASSED
Frontend BUSINESS REGISTRATION: City selector in Step 2 (Location) replaces old text input - PASSED
Frontend BUSINESS REGISTRATION: Cities load based on selected country in Step 1 - PASSED
Frontend BUSINESS REGISTRATION: Found 20 city options for MX - PASSED
Frontend BUSINESS REGISTRATION: Can select Ciudad de México from dropdown - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: CitySelector.jsx correctly fetches cities from /api/cities?country_code=XX when countryCode prop changes
CitySelector supports both selection from list AND free-text input for custom cities
RegisterPage.jsx has CitySelector between phone and age verification fields
BusinessRegisterPage.jsx has CitySelector in Step 2 (Location) replacing old text input
Backend /api/cities endpoint correctly filters by country_code parameter
Backend seed endpoint uses upsert for idempotent city seeding (122+ cities for 16 countries)
UserCreate model in server.py includes optional city field
test_credentials: No credentials needed - tested registration pages and public APIs
seed_data_creation: None - used existing seeded cities data (122+ cities for 16 countries)
context_for_next_testing_agent: City selector feature is fully implemented and tested. Key points: (1) CitySelector.jsx is a reusable combobox component with data-testid='city-selector' and 'city-selector-input', (2) Cities load from GET /api/cities?country_code=XX when countryCode prop changes, (3) City options have data-testid='city-option-{slug}', (4) Component supports free-text input - shows 'No se encontró. Puedes escribir tu ciudad' when no match, (5) User registration: city field is between phone and age verification, (6) Business registration: city selector is in Step 2 (Location) replacing old text input, (7) Backend cities.py has 122+ cities for 16 countries (MX=20, US=10, CO=10, AR=8, CL=6, PE=6, EC=5, ES=8, GT=4, SV=3, HN=3, CR=4, PA=3, VE=5, BR=8, DO=3, CU=2, PY=2, UY=2, BO=3, NI=2, CA=5), (8) Seed endpoint is idempotent via upsert
